shippingAddress.address: House 123/124 near daniyal super store garden town multan

faqs.question: Do you offer Cash on Delivery (COD)?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer Cash on Delivery across Pakistan. You can pay when you receive your order. Some remote areas may require advance payment.

faqs.question: How long does delivery take?
faqs.answer: Major cities (Lahore, Karachi, Islamabad, Rawalpindi): 2-3 business days. Other cities: 3-5 business days. Remote areas: 5-7 business days.

faqs.question: Are the products original?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We only sell 100% original, quality-checked products. Every item comes with a warranty card and authenticity guarantee.

faqs.question: What is your return policy?
faqs.answer: You can return an unused product within 7 days if it's defective or doesn't match the description. Return shipping is paid by the customer unless the product is defective.

faqs.question: When do I get free shipping?
faqs.answer: Orders over Rs. 5,000 get free standard shipping across Pakistan. Orders below that amount have a Rs. 250 standard shipping charge.

faqs.question: How do I order via WhatsApp?
faqs.answer: Message us on WhatsApp with the product name or link. Our team will confirm your order and share delivery details.

faqs.question: How do I claim warranty?
faqs.answer: Follow the process on the warranty card included with your product, or contact our support team. Email: hello@paktech.pk or WhatsApp: +92 300 1234567

faqs.question: Do you accept bulk/corporate orders?
faqs.answer: Yes! Special pricing is available for corporate and bulk orders. Contact us via the contact page or email.

testimonials.name: Ahmed Hassan
testimonials.comment: Ordered from PakTech — the product was completely genuine and delivered in 2 days. Highly recommended for tech lovers in Pakistan!

testimonials.name: Sana Mirza
testimonials.comment: Best online tech store I've found in Pakistan. COD option made it so easy to order. The smartwatch quality is amazing!

testimonials.name: Bilal Ahmed
testimonials.comment: The GaN charger is incredibly fast — charges my MacBook and phone at the same time. Premium packaging too.

testimonials.name: Ayesha Khan
testimonials.comment: Ordered via WhatsApp and got same-day confirmation. Customer service is top notch. Will order again!

testimonials.name: Usman Tariq
testimonials.comment: The gaming headset sound quality is incredible. Footsteps are crystal clear in PUBG. Worth every rupee!

testimonials.name: Maria Joseph
testimonials.comment: The 30000mAh power bank lasted our entire family trip. Genuine product with warranty card. Thank you PakTech!
